title: Patch<T> uses Default::default() = Keep: correct serde default for partial-update semantics
description: Making Patch::Keep the derive(Default) default is the correct choice for partial-update semantics: #[serde(default)] on Patch fields maps absent → Keep (no change), which is the correct interpretation for JMAP partial-update events. Any other default (Set or Clear) would change absent fields' semantics. A contributor might suggest making Patch::Keep the 'zero value' look like None (i.e., Option<T>) — resist: Patch<T> has three states that Option<T> cannot represent cleanly.
